title: Fix internal error after suppressible MODDUP warning

features.name: package duplicate with line directive
features.description: Code should include a package that is defined twice using `line` preprocessor directives pointing to different original source file paths, triggering a MODDUP warning

features.name: module with iobuf primitive instantiation
features.description: Code should include a module that instantiates the IOBUF primitive, which appears in the bug-triggering code alongside the package duplication

features.name: suppressible moddup warning scenario
features.description: Code should include constructs that trigger a MODDUP warning which can be suppressed, where suppression leads to an internal error in Verilator
